two double portions (of الْعَذَابِ - the punishment)
a curse (emphasizing the curse in وَٱلْعَنْهُمْ)
O you all! (addressing the believers - الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا)
those who (describing the believers who are being addressed)
they believed (referring to the believers being addressed)
like those who (connected to تَكُونُوا۟ - be not)
and so he cleared him from blame (referring to موسى)
and he was (connects this phrase to the previous part of the ayah)
they believed (those who are addressed in يٰٓأَيُّهَا)
Allah (the one true God who is being addressed)
and (all of you) say! (command to group)
your deeds (referring to the people being addressed in يُصْلِحْ لَكُمْ - He will correct for you)
and He forgives (in response to وَمَن يُطِعِ - whoever obeys)
for you all (object of يُصْلِحْ - he will rectify)
your sins (object of يَغْفِرْ - He will forgive)
Allah (as the object being obeyed in يُطِعِ)
he has achieved success (subject of فَقَدْ)
a great victory/success (object of فَازَ - 'has achieved')
the trust (object of عَرَضْنَا - we offered)
and the earth (object of عَرَضْنَا/we offered)
and so they (feminine) refused (responding to عَرَضْنَا - We offered)
and they (feminine) became anxiously fearful (of الْأَمَانَةَ - the trust)
and he carried it (referring to الْأَمَانَةَ - the trust)
he was (describing the human in الْإِنسٰنُ)
one who often acts unfairly (describing كَانَ)
the hypocrites (those being punished by يُعَذِّبَ)
and the female hypocrites (acted upon by يُعَذِّبَ)
and he returns back (subject of يُعَذِّبَ)
and the female believers (object of يُعَذِّبَ)
and he was (connects to غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًۢا - forgiving and merciful)
Allah (the one true God) (subject of يُعَذِّبَ - will punish)
constantly forgiving (describing Allah in this ayah)
extremely merciful (describing Allah in this ayah)
